semantic_description: array_prefix_max handles a nonnegative-length integer array. For n == 0 it returns without modifying memory beyond preserving both full arrays. For n > 0 it reads input array a, writes out[0] = a[0], then runs a for_loop from i = 1 to n - 1 with an if branch that updates cur when a[i] is larger. The output array should contain, at every index i, some element from the prefix a[0..i] that is at least every element in that prefix; the input array is preserved and the output array is overwritten with the prefix maximum sequence.
